body.title: test_surface_aged_intents_pushes_twm_markers fails — GOAL_TEST_DECAY_SURFACE not surfaced
body.result: Verified test passes (1/1) on current main — auto-resolved by T-twm-salience-time-decay as the ticket itself predicted.
body.description:
Surfaced during T-strengthen-no-sqlite-filter sprint. Pre-existing failure unrelated to that ticket's palace/skill-only change.

**Symptom:** tests/test_intent_decay.py::test_surface_aged_intents_pushes_twm_markers fails — after calling surface_aged_intents(), cortex.twm_read(category='aged_intent') returns 0 matching entries when the test expects >= 1.

**Affected files:** tests/test_intent_decay.py:216, wild_igor/igor/* intent-decay path (surface_aged_intents + twm writer). Affected files TBD — discovery-shaped.

**Design rules:** no-sqlite — no persistence changes; this is a test+glue-code investigation. no-new-memory-schemas — reuses existing memories/twm infra. test-plan-or-why-not — existing test is the spec; fix makes it pass.

**Scope boundary:** In: diagnose why the aged intent doesn't land in twm_read('aged_intent'). Fix. Out: broader intent-decay design review.

**Test plan:** re-run `pytest tests/test_intent_decay.py::test_surface_aged_intents_pushes_twm_markers` → must pass. Full suite `pytest tests/` → no new failures.
